priorities: Use full names instead of abbreviations.

deadlines: Confirm open data gaps before team-wide share.

redFlags.issue: Podcast slot count, guests, and final agenda need confirmation
redFlags.whyItMatters: The latest workbook shows podcast production windows and a 4-slot pattern, while earlier notes referenced a different slot count. Do not treat guests/timings as final until approved.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Approve final podcast slots, guests, presenter wording, and production timing.
redFlags.notes: Presenter Michail Katkoff appears where sourced; guests remain TBC unless confirmed.

redFlags.issue: Mobile Casino / Poker setup timing and 33 chair requirement
redFlags.whyItMatters: There is a setup timing conflict and a specific requirement for 33 poker chairs. This impacts Arcade layout and supplier access.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Confirm final setup window, delivery access, and chair count.
redFlags.notes: Keep visible until timing and 33 chairs are confirmed.

redFlags.whyItMatters: HORIZONS Hall and closing moments depend on screen assets, test playback, and final sign-off.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Confirm all screen content and playback test owner.
redFlags.notes: Linked to HORIZONS Hall and content capture.

redFlags.whyItMatters: Supplier access, setup, active time, and performance windows must connect clearly to the correct day/location.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Confirm supplier timing gaps from DATA_GAPS_FINAL.
redFlags.notes: Supplier cards group day/time blocks but unresolved fields remain marked.

redFlags.issue: Unknown initials and name confirmations remain in source data
redFlags.whyItMatters: On-site users need full names, not abbreviations. Unclear initials should be confirmed before becoming final.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Confirm remaining names marked “Name confirmation needed.”
redFlags.notes: Known initials have been expanded; unknowns are flagged rather than guessed.

redFlags.whyItMatters: Menus, call sheets, signage, maps, room layouts, and supplier files must be easy to open from mobile.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Upload final files or confirm placeholder can remain.
redFlags.notes: Missing files are labelled File Needed or Awaiting Asset Upload.

redFlags.issue: Nearest hospital / emergency route needs confirmation
redFlags.whyItMatters: The call sheet and locations section need a confirmed medical route before onsite use.
redFlags.decisionNeeded: Confirm the exact hospital/medical location, route, venue medical contact, and protocol.
redFlags.notes: Temporary Google Maps search link is shown until confirmed.

siteDataUxAudit.whatWasFound: Call sheet data was present but embedded in the wider page flow.
siteDataUxAudit.impact: Onsite users may scroll too much to find the daily production view.
siteDataUxAudit.recommendedFix: Create day-specific call sheet page view with Today tab, print button, emergency, weather, notes, documents, red flags, and missing files.

siteDataUxAudit.whatWasFound: Major locations did not consistently expose map links or emergency medical reference.
siteDataUxAudit.impact: Team cannot tap quickly into maps under pressure.
siteDataUxAudit.recommendedFix: Add google_maps_url support and emergency medical card marked Needs Confirmation.

siteDataUxAudit.whatWasFound: Weather module was a static placeholder.
siteDataUxAudit.impact: Call sheet could not support outdoor/drone/sunset decisions.
siteDataUxAudit.recommendedFix: Connect Open-Meteo with local caching and graceful fallback.

siteDataUxAudit.whatWasFound: Updates are local-only and Slack notification behavior was not explicit.
siteDataUxAudit.impact: Team may expect comments to notify Slack automatically.
siteDataUxAudit.recommendedFix: Add Slack notify fields and local activity log stub; backend/webhooks still needed for real posting.

siteDataUxAudit.impact: Conflicting duplicate records can create uncertainty.
siteDataUxAudit.recommendedFix: Show Duplicate Review admin section; merge only after human review unless exact and safe.

siteDataUxAudit.whatWasFound: Source health was not visible to admins.
siteDataUxAudit.impact: Samuel/Chris cannot quickly see whether the data is ready for wider team use.
siteDataUxAudit.recommendedFix: Add Data Health Dashboard admin section.
